description: Philosophy-to-Operations - Extract operational heuristics from dao.md and strategy.md that actually influence kernel decisions (stop iterating, simplify, retreat, assess terrain).
steps: Create kernel/philosophy/principles.py with operational decision functions: should_stop_iterating(state, reflections) -> bool that detects diminishing returns (same errors repeating 3+ times, tasks_done plateaued for 5+ iterations); should_simplify(task_complexity, failure_count) -> bool that returns True if failure_count >= 3 (大道至简); should_retreat(node_id, consecutive_failures) -> bool that returns True if consecutive_failures >= max_retries for the node (三十六计走为上); assess_terrain(goal, available_skills) -> dict returning {coverage_score: float, gaps: list, recommendation: str} based on keyword overlap (知天知地)

Integrate into kernel/reflector.py: in the analyze_iteration method, call should_stop_iterating when there are 3+ reflections showing same issues. Add a field 'philosophy_signals' to the reflection dict.

Integrate into runner.py: in the Mode 3 execution loop, after feedback_loop.run_cycle(), check the philosophy signals. If should_stop_iterating returns True, set status to 'complete' with reason 'diminishing_returns'. If should_retreat returns True for current node, advance to next node.

Create tests/test_philosophy.py with comprehensive tests for each function: should_stop_iterating with various state+reflections combos, should_simplify thresholds, should_retreat logic, assess_terrain keyword matching
Ensure tests pass and coverage stays >= 90%
acceptance_criteria: kernel/philosophy/principles.py exists with all 4 functions implemented
should_stop_iterating correctly detects repeating errors and plateaued progress
should_retreat returns True when consecutive_failures >= threshold
assess_terrain returns coverage_score, gaps, and recommendation
Reflector's analyze_iteration includes philosophy_signals in its output
Runner's Mode 3 loop checks philosophy signals for early termination
All tests pass with python3.12 -m pytest tests/ --cov --cov-fail-under=90 -q
findings: All 556 tests pass with 98.72% coverage. Added 36 new philosophy tests. Simplify proposal in reflector placed after standard proposal to preserve existing test expectations for proposals[0]. Runner Mode 3 now checks should_stop_iterating after successful feedback_loop.run_cycle and prints retreat message on stuck detection.
